params.faculty: The faculty the student is enrolled in
params.student: The wallet address of the student

params.owner: Address for whom to check the ownership

returns._0: True if `owner` has a valid token, false otherwise
True if the token is valid, false otherwise

revoke(uint256).details: Marks the 'revoked' status as true in the Student struct

params.tokenId: The unique ID of the token to be revoked

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Interface identification is specified in ERC-165. This function  uses less than 30,000 gas.

params.interfaceId: The interface identifier, as specified in ERC-165

returns._0: `true` if the contract implements `interfaceID` and  `interfaceID` is not 0xffffffff, `false` otherwise

enrollStudent(address,string,string).notice: Issues a new Identity Soulbound Token to a student

hasValid(address).notice: Check if an address owns a valid token in the contract

isValid(uint256).notice: Check if a token hasn't been revoked

revoke(uint256).notice: Revokes a student's identity token (e.g., in case of expulsion)

supportsInterface(bytes4).notice: Query if a contract implements an interface
